# Calling Bell

## Observed Text

- Upon pickup, obtain a unique Curse and 3 Relics.

## Related Cards

- Curse of the Bell: Unplayable. Eternal.

## Strategy Notes

- Strong immediate relic value but adds permanent draw pollution; prefer when three relics clearly solve current act needs or the deck has enough draw/exhaust to absorb Curse of the Bell.
